title: Totem of Rigby
description: this resource pack changes the texture for the totem of undying
body:
who even likes the totem texture? this resource-pack adds a way cooler texture for the totem of undying, just download and you will see!

![-](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7feb259c7bb90513d468a601bf51e1c0b19ecd10.png)
